_meta.source: World Bank Climate Change Knowledge Portal (cckpapi.worldbank.org)
_meta.notes: Per-country climate projections under SSP2-4.5 (CMIP6 ensemble mean). Historical baseline 1991-2020 from ERA5. Projection period 2040-2059. 3 indicators: historical mean temperature (°C), projected temperature change by 2050 (°C), projected precipitation change by 2050 (%). Covered 0 countries.
